ab: soni pitu takananga mukusa ku tarisinata.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: kiatuturu cu. musikarʉ takituturua. makasi pan-cang: “aratakaraa! musu’ʉvʉ!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: miaa kiatuturu, tumatuturu kimia takituturua sʉpʉrʉ tamna kari.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Kanakanavu language of numbers.

ab: tuapapa kim sumasʉpʉrʉ. paracani kim sʉpʉrʉ tamna cani.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.
I have learned many Kanakanavu languages.

ab: tantaniara ku mukusa tarisinata. tantaniara kiatuturu kari Kanakanavu. tia ku ’apatimana cina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Kanakanavu language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
